name: Santa Slides to Town
short_description: Race through snowy slopes with Santa! Dodge obstacles, collect stars, and unlock levels, upgrades, and sleigh skins. Play solo, split-screen, or online in festive fun!
detailed_description:
Guide Santa Claus as he slides through snowy landscapes, dodging obstacles and gathering stars along the way. Tap to jump, double-jump, or even triple-jump as you race to reach the town before time runs out, setting new records with every successful dash. Every second counts in this fast-paced, family-friendly holiday adventure. However, it is easy to just play, and downhill helps travelling for younger players.  

Collect stars to unlock new levels, upgrades, and visual customizations for Santa himself! From sleigh effects to colors, you can add a personal touch to Santa’s look as you progress. Each upgrade brings new excitement to your journey, helping you face tougher obstacles and new challenges.

Santa Slides to Town also features a two-player split-screen mode, perfect for some friendly competition! Challenge a friend to see who can reach the town fastest and claim the title of top sleigh-rider, or just collect stars together. With simple cinematics and plenty of holiday charm, this game is the ultimate festive thrill ride for players of all ages.

In addition, you can play together online with your Steam friends.  Collect stars together or race against others. Online game is balanced using stamina system where leading racer loses stamina, but can collect stars to increase it. Also, achievement skins drop continuously some kind of "presents" for others online players. Online game is designed up to 16 players.

FEATURES

  • Simple one-button playing mechanism

  • Over 45 levels, each of which have some kind of "special" thing.

  • 13 Steam achievements that unlock skins in game

  • Multiplayer with Steam friends.

  • Split screen for local coop

  • Good for winter holidays. Help Santa to come earlier.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Finnish, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Swedish
*languages with full audio support
